# NimbleLogic AI

## About
NimbleLogic AI provides AI automation services for small businesses. We specialize in AI phone agents, AI personal assistants, and AI business operations. Based in New York City, we offer both remote and in-person setup services.

## Services
- AI Phone Agent: 24/7 AI-powered call answering, lead qualification, and appointment booking for businesses that can't afford to miss calls. Starting at $199/month.
- AI Personal Assistant: Custom AI assistant setup for professionals — handles email, scheduling, research, and task management. One-time $599 setup.
- AI Business Operations: End-to-end AI automation for business workflows — from customer intake to invoicing. Custom pricing starting at $699.

## Key Differentiator
Unlike DIY AI tools, NimbleLogic provides hands-on setup and customization. We configure the AI for your specific business, train it on your services and pricing, and provide ongoing optimization. Available for in-person setup in the NYC metro area.

## Industries Served
Home services (plumbers, HVAC, electricians, roofers, landscapers), legal (solo attorneys, small firms), healthcare (dental offices, med spas, clinics), professional services (real estate, insurance, consultants, salons).
